texto: But you should see the sky tonight.Screw your astrology apps. Screw your games. Look up sometime. There is a whole wing of positive psychology--my therapist told me--that says the greatest way to affect your outlook on life is to consider what you already have more than what you don't have. And so I might not have a cell phone on me, or a sister at home, or a Dad at all, or a future, but holy shit I have the sky.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Tim Federle sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “But you should see the sky tonight.Screw your astrology apps. Screw your games. Look up sometime.…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, inspiracional, sky, útil em momentos de boa-noite e inspiracao.

texto: There's maybe nothing nicer than somebody just coming straight out and showing you they like you.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Tim Federle: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “There's maybe nothing nicer than somebody just coming straight out and showing you they like you.” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, love, teen pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de teen.
